case_title: JASON TOURCHETTE GUARDIAN FOR MINOR VICTOR ALLEN VS. GAP INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-27-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY VIERU, VERONICA AS TO DEFENDANT GAP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOURCHETTE, JASON AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR MINOR VICTOR ALLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GAP INC. VERONICA VIERU IS REMOVED AS PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF VICTOR ALLEN TOURCHETTE'S (MINOR) FATHER, JASON TOURCHETTE, IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM IN THIS PROCEEDING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE) SERVED APR-09-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAP INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-27-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-27-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF IS A MINOR VCITOR ALLEN WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON TOURCHETTE--FATHER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ALEXANDER TORREZ--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
